day.name: Eggs & Toast
day.description: Our signature egg dishes served on house-baked sourdough

items.name: Smashed Avo on Sourdough
items.description: Whipped ricotta, heirloom tomatoes, dukkah, micro herbs, chilli flakes on house sourdough

items.name: Truffle Mushroom Eggs
items.description: Scrambled free-range eggs, sautéed mixed mushrooms, truffle oil, fresh thyme, sourdough toast

items.name: Eggs Benedict
items.description: Poached free-range eggs, shaved leg ham, hollandaise sauce, toasted English muffin, chives

items.name: Shakshuka
items.description: Baked eggs in spiced tomato and capsicum sauce, feta, fresh coriander, grilled sourdough

items.name: Açaí Bowl
items.description: Organic açaí blend, house-made granola, sliced banana, seasonal berries, coconut flakes, honey drizzle

items.name: Roasted Pumpkin & Quinoa
items.description: Tri-colour quinoa, honey-roasted pumpkin, baby spinach, pepitas, pomegranate, tahini dressing

items.name: Smoked Salmon Grain Bowl
items.description: Farro, house-cured smoked salmon, cucumber ribbons, avocado, capers, lemon crème fraîche

day.name: Sandwiches
day.description: Loaded sandwiches on freshly baked bread

items.name: Croque Monsieur
items.description: Gruyère, leg ham, béchamel, Dijon mustard, toasted house sourdough, side salad

items.name: Roasted Vegetable Ciabatta
items.description: Char-grilled zucchini, capsicum, eggplant, bocconcini, basil pesto, sun-dried tomatoes

items.name: Frankie's Chicken Club
items.description: Crispy free-range chicken, streaky bacon, avocado, iceberg lettuce, house aioli, toasted brioche

items.name: Ricotta Hotcakes
items.description: Fluffy ricotta hotcakes, seasonal berry compote, mascarpone, toasted almond flakes, maple syrup

items.name: House Banana Bread
items.description: Warm toasted banana bread, whipped honey butter, fresh banana, sprinkle of cinnamon

day.name: Hot Drinks
day.description: Single-origin espresso by Five Senses Coffee

items.name: Flat White
items.description: Double ristretto, velvety steamed milk — Melbourne's quintessential coffee

items.name: Long Black
items.description: Double espresso over hot water, full-bodied with a rich crema

items.name: Ceremonial Matcha Latte
items.description: Premium Japanese ceremonial matcha, steamed oat milk, light honey — available iced

items.name: House Masala Chai
items.description: Hand-blended spiced chai concentrate, steamed full-cream or oat milk, dusting of cinnamon

items.name: Cold Brew Coffee
items.description: 12-hour steeped single-origin cold brew, served over ice — smooth, never bitter

items.name: Pressed Juice of the Day
items.description: Ask your server for today's seasonal pressed juice blend — changes daily

items.name: Sparkling Water
items.description: Antipodes sparkling mineral water, 500ml

night.name: Small Plates
night.description: Share and graze — designed for the table

items.name: Burrata & Heirloom Tomatoes
items.description: Imported burrata, heritage tomatoes, basil oil, aged balsamic, sea salt, grilled focaccia

items.name: Wagyu Beef Croquettes
items.description: Crispy wagyu and mozzarella croquettes, smoked paprika aioli, pickled jalapeño

items.name: Wild Mushroom Bruschetta
items.description: Sautéed wild mushrooms, whipped goat's cheese, fresh thyme, toasted house sourdough

items.name: Hiramasa Kingfish Crudo
items.description: Thinly sliced kingfish, yuzu dressing, cucumber, pickled ginger, sesame, micro coriander

items.name: Pan-Roasted Barramundi
items.description: Crispy-skin barramundi, cauliflower purée, broccolini, caper butter, lemon, fresh dill

items.name: Slow-Braised Lamb Shoulder
items.description: 8-hour braised lamb, pomegranate molasses glaze, roasted carrots, herbed polenta, mint gremolata

items.name: Whole Roasted Cauliflower
items.description: Roasted cauliflower steak, chermoula, chickpea and spinach ragout, toasted almonds, harissa oil

items.name: Dark Chocolate Fondant
items.description: Valrhona dark chocolate fondant, Tahitian vanilla bean ice cream, salted caramel, praline

items.name: Lemon Curd Tart
items.description: Classic French lemon curd tart, torched Italian meringue, candied lemon zest, raspberry coulis

night.name: Wine
night.description: Curated selection of Victorian and national drops

items.name: Chardonnay — Yering Station, Yarra Valley
items.description: Crisp and elegant with stone fruit notes, subtle oak, long mineral finish — glass / bottle

items.name: Pinot Noir — Bass Phillip, Gippsland
items.description: Silky and complex with dark cherry, spice, earthy undertones — glass / bottle

items.name: Orange Wine — Commune of Buttons, SA
items.description: Skin-contact Chenin Blanc, amber hue, textural with dried apricot and tangy finish

items.name: Prosecco — La Marca, Veneto
items.description: Light and effervescent, green apple, white peach, delicate floral aromas — glass

items.name: Frankie's Spritz
items.description: Aperol, house citrus cordial, prosecco, soda, orange slice, fresh rosemary sprig

items.name: Smoked Old Fashioned
items.description: Buffalo Trace bourbon, Angostura bitters, demerara syrup, tableside cherry wood smoke

items.name: Yuzu Margarita
items.description: El Jimador blanco tequila, Cointreau, fresh yuzu juice, lime, salted rim, dehydrated lime

special.name: Winter Series
special.description: A limited seasonal menu celebrating the best of winter produce

items.name: Black Truffle Tagliatelle
items.description: House-made egg tagliatelle, black truffle shavings, aged Parmigiano, brown butter, crispy sage

items.name: Duck Confit & Lentilles du Puy
items.description: Slow-confit duck leg, French green lentils, pancetta, roasted root vegetables, red wine jus

items.name: Roasted Tomato & Fennel Soup
items.description: Slow-roasted Roma tomato, caramelised fennel, house-made sourdough croutons, basil oil
